description: Pudu Robotics is a global leader in commercial service robotics, dedicated to the design, R&D, production, and sales of service robots. Built on three core technologies—mobility, manipulation, and AI—Pudu has pioneered an industry-first 'One Brain, Multiple Embodiments' architecture and offers product lines spanning service delivery, commercial cleaning, industrial delivery, and embodied AI. The company has shipped over 120,000 units globally across more than 80 countries.
short_description: Global leader in commercial service robots for delivery, cleaning, and industrial logistics

products.name: BellaBot Pro
products.description: Indoor delivery robot with cat-inspired design, four trays, dual SLAM navigation (laser + visual), AI voice interaction, and a 18.5-inch advertising screen. Designed for restaurants, retail, and hospitality.

products.name: KettyBot
products.description: Compact delivery and reception robot with a large 18.5-inch advertising screen. Features dual SLAM navigation, 55cm ultra-narrow path clearance, and AI voice interaction. Suitable for restaurants, retail, hotels, and supermarkets.

products.name: SwiftBot
products.description: Indoor delivery robot with enclosed compartments featuring auto-open/close doors, laser projector, voice interaction, and integrated SLAM positioning. Supports multiple communication interfaces and peripheral expansion.

products.name: PUDU T300
products.description: Heavy-duty autonomous mobile robot (AMR) for industrial material transport. Capable of hauling up to 300kg with VSLAM+ and LiDAR SLAM navigation. ISO 3691-4 safety compliant with 360° omni-sense safety system.

description: Quicktron Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd. is a high-tech company specializing in intelligent warehousing robots and automated logistics solutions. The company provides various types of AMRs and backstage operating systems, deploying over 35,000 robotic units worldwide. Quicktron serves industries such as e-commerce, manufacturing, retail, and third-party logistics across more than 30 countries.
short_description: Leading Chinese AMR provider for intelligent warehousing and logistics automation

products.name: QuickBin Ultra
products.description: Flagship piece-picking solution combining M5E mobile robots and A5 intelligent lift system for goods-to-person operations. Dramatically enhances order picking speed and storage density with ultra-fast mobility and long battery life.

products.name: QuickMove M-Series
products.description: Autonomous mobile robot series for material handling with payloads from 30kg to 1500kg. Features QR code navigation, high positioning accuracy, and long battery life for flexible intralogistics automation.

description: Megvii Technology (Face++) is an AI-powered technology company that entered smart logistics through its wholly-owned subsidiary Megvii Robotics. The company leverages its proprietary Brain++ AI platform and Hetu operating system to provide intelligent warehousing solutions, including AS/RS systems, AMRs, pallet shuttles, and AI-powered picking systems as part of its 3A solution (AS/RS+AMR+AI).
short_description: AI company delivering intelligent warehousing and logistics automation solutions

products.name: MegBot-MN Miniload AS/RS
products.description: AI-powered mini load automated storage and retrieval system for high-density bin storage. Features walk speed of 360m/min and lifting speed of 180m/min. Height adaptability from 3–14m with single/dual-deep shelf configurations.

products.name: 3D Pallet Shuttle System
products.description: Intelligent 3D pallet shuttle system for high-density pallet storage with distributed control architecture and AI-powered Hetu scheduling. Deployed in hundreds of units globally for new energy, food, pharmaceutical, and manufacturing industries.

description: Dobot Robotics is a leading collaborative robot manufacturer specializing in desktop-grade and industrial robotic arms. With over 100,000 cobots deployed across 100+ countries, Dobot offers a payload product matrix from 0.25kg to 30kg. The company went public on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange in December 2024 (SEHK: 2432) and has evolved into a multimodal embodied AI platform.
short_description: Leading collaborative robot manufacturer with full-stack robotics technology

products.name: CR5
products.description: 6-axis collaborative robot with 5kg payload and 900mm working radius. Features ±0.02mm repeatability, drag-to-teach programming, multi-level collision detection, and supports various industrial applications including inspection, assembly, screwdriving, and bin picking.

products.name: MG400
products.description: Ultra-compact 4-axis desktop robotic arm with a footprint smaller than A4 paper. Features 750g payload, 440mm reach, drag-to-teach, and collision detection. Ideal for small-batch flexible production in light industrial applications.

description: Siasun Robot & Automation Co., Ltd. is one of the largest robotics manufacturers in China, affiliated with the Chinese Academy of Sciences. The company produces industrial robots, mobile robots, special robots, and collaborative robots with independent intellectual property rights. Siasun has written more than 100 'industry firsts' in Chinese robotics history and exports to over 40 countries.
short_description: China's largest state-backed robotics manufacturer covering industrial, mobile, and collaborative robots

products.name: SR25A-25/1.80
products.description: Six-axis industrial robot in the SIA series with 25kg payload and 1803mm reach. Features hollow arm design, high-stiffness lightweight structure, and advanced drive system for high-precision welding, cutting, handling, and assembly applications.

products.name: GCR5-910 Collaborative Robot
products.description: High-end 6-axis collaborative robot with 5kg payload and 917mm reach. Features 16 TUV-certified safety functions, 2D/3D vision integration, force sensing, and drag-to-teach programming for safe human-robot collaboration.

description: UBTECH Robotics is a leading humanoid robot company and the first humanoid robotics company listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange (SEHK: 9880). With a full-stack humanoid robotics technology platform including ROSA 2.0, high-performance servo actuators, and AI integration, UBTECH develops humanoid robots for industrial manufacturing, commercial services, and household companionship. The company holds over 2,790 robotic and AI-related patents.
short_description: World's first publicly listed humanoid robot company with full-stack humanoid robotics technology

products.name: Walker S
products.description: Industrial humanoid robot with 41 servo joints and force feedback, designed for real automotive production lines. Integrated with LLM, RGB-D perception, 3D semantic mapping, and ROSA 2.0 platform. Deployed at NIO manufacturing facilities for assembly line tasks.

products.name: Yanshee
products.description: Open-source humanoid robot platform designed for AI education and programming learning. Supports multiple programming languages and features a modular design for STEM education.

description: Unitree Robotics is a high-performance legged and humanoid robotics company focusing on R&D, production, and sales of quadrupeds, humanoids, and robotic arms. The company fully self-develops core components including motors, reducers, controllers, and LiDAR. Unitree has achieved global technological leadership in quadruped robots and set a world speed record of 3.3m/s with its H1 humanoid.
short_description: Global leader in legged robotics with quadrupeds and humanoids at competitive prices

products.name: Go2
products.description: Intelligent quadruped robot dog with 4D LiDAR L1 for 360°×90° hemispherical recognition, advanced motion control, and up to 5m/s running speed. Available in Air, Pro, and EDU variants with payload capacities up to 12kg.

products.name: H1
products.description: Full-size general-purpose humanoid robot with world-record running speed of 3.3m/s. Features 360N.m knee torque, 864Wh battery, 3D LiDAR + depth camera perception, and potential mobility exceeding 5m/s.

description: AUBO Robotics is a national high-tech enterprise specializing in the R&D, production, and sales of collaborative robots. The company offers a payload range from 3kg to 35kg with open SDK supporting C/C++/C#/Lua/Python and ROS. AUBO cobots serve sectors including automotive, precision manufacturing, and smart factory integration across 50+ countries.
short_description: Chinese collaborative robot maker with open-architecture cobots for industrial automation

products.name: AUBO-i5
products.description: 6-axis collaborative robot with 5kg payload, 886.5mm reach, and ±0.02mm repeatability. Features hand-guiding teaching, collision detection, and any-angle mounting. Ideal for assembly, screwdriving, and machine tending.

products.name: AUBO-i10
products.description: 6-axis collaborative robot with 10kg payload and 1350mm reach, AUBO's longest-reach cobot. Features ±0.03mm repeatability and ≤4.0m/s tool velocity. Suitable for wide workspaces and medium-duty applications including palletizing and machine tending.

description: Gaussian Robotics (Gausium) is a world-leading provider of autonomous cleaning solutions and one of the earliest companies globally engaged in the R&D of autonomous mobile technology. The company offers the most comprehensive floor cleaning robot portfolio covering scrubbing, sweeping, vacuuming, dust mopping, sanitizing, and crystallizing. With over 200 million kilometers of cleaning services provided across 40+ countries, Gausium leads the commercial cleaning robot market with over 90% share in mainland China.
short_description: World's leading autonomous cleaning robot company with comprehensive floor cleaning portfolio

products.name: Scrubber 75
products.description: Industrial-grade autonomous floor scrubbing robot with 750mm cleaning width, 3000m²/h theoretical efficiency, and 45kg brush pressure. Features 20+ sensors, 3D LiDAR, optional millimeter-wave radar, 270° rotational scrub deck, and 4-stage water filtration system. Ideal for large-area heavy-duty cleaning in warehouses, factories, and parking lots.

products.name: ECOBOT Sprayer 50
products.description: Compact autonomous cleaning and sanitizing robot combining scrubbing, sweeping, dust mopping, and disinfectant spraying in one platform. Features ultra-fine atomization (≤5 micron) with adjustable flow for comprehensive hygienic care.

description: Estun Automation is China's leading industrial robot manufacturer and the top domestic enterprise in industrial robot shipments for many consecutive years. The company's business spans the full automation chain from core components and motion control systems to industrial robots and intelligent manufacturing systems. Estun went public on the Shenzhen Stock Exchange in 2015 and completed a Hong Kong secondary listing in March 2026.
short_description: China's largest domestic industrial robot manufacturer with full automation supply chain

products.name: ER220-3100
products.description: Heavy-duty 6-axis industrial robot with 220kg payload and 3100mm reach. Features high-rigidity structure, ±0.06mm repeatability, and IP54 protection for demanding material handling, palletizing, and large-part assembly in automotive, aerospace, and heavy manufacturing.

products.name: ER7-910
products.description: Compact 6-axis industrial robot with 7kg payload and 910mm reach from Estun's ER series. Ideal for small to medium payload applications including welding, handling, and assembly in 3C electronics, metal processing, and packaging.

description: Boston Dynamics is the global leader in mobile robotics, developing advanced robots including Spot, Stretch, and Atlas. The fully electric Atlas humanoid robot, unveiled in 2024 and entering production in 2026, represents the world's most dynamic commercial humanoid. Atlas features 56 degrees of freedom, 50kg instant payload capacity, self-swappable batteries for continuous operation, and IP67 environmental rating for industrial deployment.
short_description: Global leader in mobile robotics with the world's most advanced commercial humanoid robot

products.name: Atlas (Electric)
products.description: Enterprise-grade fully electric humanoid robot designed for industrial automation. Features 56 DOF with continuous joint rotation, 50kg instant / 30kg sustained payload, self-swappable batteries, fenceless safety system, and IP67 rating. Deployed for part sequencing, machine tending, and order fulfillment in automotive and logistics facilities.
